name: Beef Sausage - Nella
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine ground beef, salts and pepper. Mix well.
2. Cover and refrigerate.
3. On the second day, mix again. Refrigerate.
4. On the third day, mix again. Refrigerate.
5. On the fourth day, shape into 5 rolls, about 1-1/2 inches X 10 inches.
6. Spray broiler rack with Pam.
7. Lay rolls on rack, place on lower oven rack.
8. Cook at 150°F for 8 to 10 hours.
